phases.intro_dialogue: Vela's old prototype reflection ripples outward.

nitin_janitor_boss.bullet_legend: Mop lanes, falling wet-floor signs, and chemical sweeps.
nitin_janitor_boss.pacing_note: Nitin telegraphs every cleaning route before the lab becomes dangerous.

phases.intro_dialogue: Nitin sweeps mop lanes across the abandoned lab.
phases.readability_hint: The mop head squeaks across each lane before the dirty water follows.

patterns.safe_hint: Stand in the lane the mop leaves dry.

phases.intro_dialogue: Wet-floor signs tumble from the ceiling.
phases.readability_hint: Ceiling markers appear before every sign falls.

patterns.safe_hint: Watch the ceiling markers. Stand beneath an empty column.

phases.intro_dialogue: Nitin opens the industrial rinse valve and sweeps the whole floor.
phases.readability_hint: The valve hisses on the side where the next rinse begins.

patterns.safe_hint: The rinse sweeps in alternating directions. Cross behind it.

deepak_reddy_boss.bullet_legend: Smile waves, banana decrees, and mayoral spell beams.
deepak_reddy_boss.pacing_note: Three cheerful phases gradually reveal the force hidden beneath Deepak's perfect suburb.

phases.intro_dialogue: Deepak casts cheerful loops through the mayor office speakers.
phases.readability_hint: A grin opens on one side of every ring, marking the gap to follow.

patterns.safe_hint: Follow the unlit break as each smile ring expands.

phases.intro_dialogue: The banana seal of office bends into sweeping beams.
phases.readability_hint: The mayoral seal stamps each column before the decree lands.

patterns.safe_hint: Banana decrees arc toward marked columns. Move after the seal flashes.

phases.intro_dialogue: Deepak asks the whole town to smile one final time.
phases.readability_hint: The loudspeaker on the leading side crackles before the smile beam sweeps.

patterns.safe_hint: The smile beams sweep outward. Stay near the trailing edge.
